description: UNIVERSITY OF VIRGINIA THE next session of this Institution will commence on the 1st of October and close on the 4th of July following The schoula of the University with their respective professors are 1 Ancient languages Dr Gessner Harrison 8 Modern languagesDr Charles Kraitsir 3 MathematisMr Edward H Courteney 4 Natural philosophyMr Wm B Rogers 3 Civil engineeringThe subjects of which are divided be tween the Professors of mathematics and natural philosophy 6 Chemistry and Materia MedicsDr John P Emmet ledicineDr Henry Howard natomy and SurgeryDr James L Cabell oral philosophyMr George Tucker Judge Henry St G Tucker LawJudge Henry St G Tucker both schools of languages are also taught the literature of the respective languages and ancient and modern history in the school of mathematics is included mixed mathematics in that engineering mineralogy and geology in that of moral philo sophy belles letters logic and political economy and in that of law besides municipal law in all its branches the law of nature and nations the science of government and constitutional law To be admitted into this Institution the applicant must be six teen years of age but the faculty may dispense with this requi sition in favor
